instruction:
Express $\small{f(x)=8\csc^{4}\!\left(x\right)+6\csc\!\left(x\right)}$ as a composition of two functions; that is, find $\small{g}$ and $\small{h}$ such that $\small{f=g \circ h}$. Do not use the identity function, $\small{x}$, as one of the functions.
$\begin{array}{ccc}\hline \small{g(x)} &=& [ANS] \\\hline \small{h(x)} &=& [ANS] \\\hline\end{array}$
